title: Async event handlers: async void и его ловушки

cards.prompt: async Task Boom бросает после await; try { await Boom(); } catch — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading.Tasks; async Task Boom() { await Task.Yield(); throw new InvalidOperationException("boom"); } try { await Boom(); } catch (InvalidOperationException ex) { Console.WriteLine("caught: " + ex.Message); } Console.WriteLine("after");

cards.prompt: async void OnClick с try/catch ВНУТРИ ловит своё исключение; вызов + Delay + done — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading.Tasks; async void OnClick() { try { await Task.Yield(); throw new InvalidOperationException("boom"); } catch (Exception ex) { Console.WriteLine("handler caught: " + ex.Message); } } OnClick(); await Task.Delay(100); Console.WriteLine("done");

cards.prompt: Async-обработчик события с await Task.Delay; порядок Click returned / async handler ran / handler finished?
cards.code: using System; using System.Threading.Tasks; class Button { public event EventHandler Clicked; public void Click() => Clicked?.Invoke(this, EventArgs.Empty); } var b = new Button(); var tcs = new TaskCompletionSource(); b.Clicked += async (s, e) => { await Task.Delay(10); Console.WriteLine("async handler ran"); tcs.SetResult(); }; b.Click(); Console.WriteLine("Click returned"); await tcs.Task; Console.WriteLine("handler finished");
cards.expectedOutput:
Click returned
async handler ran
handler finished
